entry.title: New IDC VA119A16D0038 awarded to QTC MEDICAL SERVICES, INC. for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Task Order (TO) placed each period of performance. Each TO indicates total dollar amount obligated and purchase order (PO) number. Contractor issues one invoice per month indicating all exam types completed and total amount invoiced. Each approved invoice decreases the total available funding by the amount of the approved invoice. If additional funding is needed, the total obligation will be increased accordingly.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MEDICAL DISABILITY EXAMINATIONS (MDES) UNDER SECTION 504 OF THE VETERANS BENEFITS IMPROVEMENTS ACT OF 1996 (PUBLIC LAW 104 275 38 U.S.C. 5101), DISTRICT 6 (NATIONAL MISSION) IGF::OT::IGF

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OFFICES OF PHYSICIANS (EXCEPT MENTAL HEALTH SPECIALISTS)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
